item.title: Rust app in terminal 🖥️
item.description: fd # find alternative exa # ls alternative dust # bored of du ? alacritty # quickTerm spotify-tui # Spotify in the terminal

item.title: 🚧 Gitlab and Github pages handling the same code 🤓
item.description: Gitlab - Master create our static website repo create gh-pages branch add web stuff inside the repo configure CI Github - Mirror create our static website repo Branch configuration Git mirror configure CI Conclusion Hello, This small blog is as you may know hosted by github page or gitlab pages, it depends where you are :) Gonna tell you a small trick to have your static website hosted on github + gitlab, with the same source code.

item.title: TheMove 🛴
item.description: I’ve quit Paris recently, to a more little City. Because of the Covid stuff, but mainly to be closer to the nature. It was in my mind since a long time, and the actual crisis, and my work, give me the opportunity to move away. Remote Work is kind of OK. I’m missing the office, and mainly the people, but since i’m not alone at home, it’s easier to handle.

item.title: GiTips 👨‍💻
item.description: Hello, Recently, I was faced with a problem. How to manage two git accounts on the same computer? I explain myself, a “personal” account and a “work” account, on the same computer. Yes, I know that working on personal things with work materials is a bad habit … but that’s another question. So, to get rid of just that (I did not invent anything, there are a lot of tutorials on the web), you will need to create a separate directory.
